texto: A lot of times when people become successful, people don't really understand what they had to do or the sacrifices they made to do that, or they assume that they had money. This is coming from, like, a kid who was broke and lived with roaches and a single mom in Dorchester.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Clinton Sparks: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A lot of times when people become successful, people don't really understand what they had to do …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, money, successful pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de successful e people.
